turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, mere liye rheumatology appointment chahiye. Joint pain hai mujhe kaafi time se.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji zaroor. Aapka naam aur contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Padmavathi ji. Humare rheumatologist Dr. Sanjay Wadekar hain. Woh har Somvaar aur Guruwar ko clinic mein hote hain. Kab aana chahenge?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Guruwar theek hai. Dopahar ke baad koi slot hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Guruwar 3 PM aur 4:30 PM available hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ho gaya! Padmavathi Rao, Guruwar 3:00 PM, Dr. Sanjay Wadekar. SMS confirm hoga. Theek ho jaiye jaldi!
